questions.q: If I lose my phone, how can I recover my account without compromising the privacy of my old data?
questions.a: If you lose your phone, you can easily recover your account and data by simply logging in from your new device using your usual credentials. Our support team is also available to assist you and guide you through the correct steps to ensure all your information is restored with complete privacy.

questions.q: How can I customize the app interface to match my personal taste?
questions.a: Our app features a flexible and innovative user interface designed to give you full control over your visual experience. You can customize your space to match your personal taste, starting from choosing color themes and modes that reflect your mood.

questions.q: Does the app consume a large amount of storage or affect the phone’s battery performance?
questions.a:
No, Bo Chat is built with a very lightweight architecture that ensures minimal usage of CPU and battery resources.
We use smart storage technology that compresses files and media without affecting their quality, helping keep your device storage free.

questions.q: How can I invite my friends to join and experience the new chapter with you?
questions.a: You can easily do that through your profile inside the app. Every friend who joins is another step toward a more free and privacy-focused digital community.

static_security_1.title: How We Protect Your Personal Data (Detailed Explanation)
static_security_1.content:
We use the latest encryption technologies (AES-256) to protect all your personal data. This military‑grade encryption ensures that your messages, photos, files, and personal information remain completely secure, both during transmission and while stored on our servers.

Your data is never shared with any third party without your explicit consent. We do not sell your personal information to advertisers or any other entities. You have full control over what information you share and with whom. You can review, update, or delete your personal data at any time from your dashboard.

Our privacy practices are audited annually by independent security firms to ensure compliance with global standards such as GDPR and CCPA. We also employ advanced threat detection systems that continuously monitor for suspicious activities, blocking potential breaches before they can affect you.

In addition, we use zero-knowledge architecture for certain sensitive features, meaning that even we cannot access your private keys or certain encrypted data. This provides an extra layer of protection against internal threats.

You can customize your privacy settings from your dashboard at any time, choosing who can see your profile picture, last seen status, and other personal details. We also offer a 'privacy mode' that hides your online status from specific contacts.

We also use password hashing so that your password is never stored in plain text. Even if someone gains access to the database, they cannot learn your password.

All communications between your device and our servers use TLS 1.3, the latest and strongest encryption protocol for data in transit. Our security certificates are automatically renewed every 90 days by a trusted authority.

In the event of any security breach (God forbid), we have a 24/7 emergency response team to assess the situation and take corrective action immediately. We will notify affected users within 72 hours at most.

For more information, you can view the full privacy policy via the link in the page footer. If you have any additional questions, do not hesitate to contact our privacy support team at privacy@bo-chat.space.

static_security_2.title: Enable Two‑Factor Authentication (2FA) – Complete Guide
static_security_2.content:
Two‑factor authentication (2FA) adds an extra layer of security to your account by requiring not only your password but also a second verification code. Even if someone steals your password, they cannot access your account without this second factor.

 To enable two‑factor authentication, follow these steps: 
1. Go to Settings > Security > Two‑Factor Authentication.
2. You will have two options:
   -  Authenticator App (recommended) : Use Google Authenticator, Authy, or Microsoft Authenticator. Scan the QR code displayed on your screen, then enter the 6‑digit code generated by the app. This code changes every 30 seconds, making it extremely secure.
   -  SMS Verification : We can send a one‑time code to your registered mobile number each time you log in. While convenient, this method is slightly less secure than an authenticator app because SIM‑swapping attacks are possible.
3. After enabling 2FA, you will be given a set of backup codes. Save these codes in a safe place (e.g., a password manager or printed on paper). If you lose access to your authenticator app, these backup codes can be used to regain access to your account.
4. Test the setup by logging out and logging back in to ensure 2FA works correctly.

 Important tips: 
- Never share your verification codes with anyone, even if they claim to be from our support team. We will never ask for your 2FA code.
- Once 2FA is active, you will be prompted to enter a code each time you log in from a new device or after clearing your browser cookies.
- You can mark trusted devices to skip 2FA on that specific device for 30 days. Use this feature only on devices you trust completely (e.g., your home computer).
- If you lose your phone, use the backup codes to log in, then temporarily disable 2FA and re‑enable it on a new device.

 What if you lose the backup codes as well? 
In that case, you will need to contact our support team. We will ask you to verify your identity through some security questions and account information. This process may take a few business days to ensure your account's security.

Two‑factor authentication is mandatory for certain sensitive accounts, such as those with administrative privileges or that contain stored payment information. We recommend all users enable it immediately to protect their accounts.

static_security_3.title: How to Create a Strong Password – Advanced Guidelines
static_security_3.content:
A strong password is your first line of defense against hackers. Here's how to create a password that is both secure and memorable:

 Characteristics of a strong password: 
- At least 12 characters long (longer is better)
- Includes uppercase and lowercase letters
- Includes numbers (0-9)
- Includes special symbols (!@#$%^&* etc.)
- Does not contain dictionary words, names, or dates
- Is unique – never reuse passwords across different services

 Examples: 
- Weak password: `password123` (easily guessed, uses a common word and sequential numbers)
- Strong password: `C7!uB$9qLp#2mR` (random, long, includes all character types)

 How to create a strong password that is easy to remember: 
Instead of a random string, use a passphrase – a sequence of random words. For example: `Correct-Horse-Battery-Staple` (but add numbers and symbols like `C0rrect-H0rse-Battery-Staple!`). This method produces a password that is long, random, and easier to remember.

 What to avoid completely: 
- Personal information (birthdates, pet names, your name, family names)
- Common patterns (`qwerty`, `123456`, `abc123`)
- Repeated characters (`aaaaaa`)
- Keyboard patterns (`asdfgh`)
- Reusing passwords across multiple sites (if one site gets hacked, all your accounts become vulnerable)

 Recommendations: 
- Use a password manager such as Bitwarden, LastPass, or 1Password. These tools generate and store strong, unique passwords for all your accounts. You only need to remember one strong master password.
- Enable two‑factor authentication (2FA) on all important accounts, especially email and banking. Even if your password is compromised, 2FA can block unauthorized access.
- Never share your password via email, text, or phone. Legitimate companies will never ask for your password.
- Change your password immediately if you suspect any unauthorized access to your account. We also recommend changing your password every 6‑12 months as good security hygiene.

 How to check your password strength? 
You can use online tools like "How Secure Is My Password" to estimate the time needed to crack your password. But be careful: never enter your actual password into any untrusted site.

 What to do if your password is compromised? 
1. Change your password immediately.
2. Log out of all devices (you can do this from Settings > Active Sessions).
3. Check for any unusual activity in your account (messages you didn't send, changes to settings).
4. Update any other accounts where you used the same password.
5. Contact our support team to inform us of the incident.

static_security_4.title: Privacy Policy and Its Updates – What You Need to Know
static_security_4.content:
We periodically update our privacy policy to ensure compliance with new laws and changes in our services. Our goal is to keep the privacy policy clear and transparent, explaining in detail how we collect, use, and protect your data.

 How we notify you of updates: 
- You will be notified by email 30 days before any material change. You will receive an email from no-reply@bo-chat.space explaining the proposed changes.
- We will also post a prominent notice inside the app upon login, summarizing the changes and inviting you to review the new policy.
- You can always view the latest version of the policy via the 'Privacy Policy' link in the page footer or in Settings > Privacy Policy.

 What typical updates include: 
- Improvements in data processing to comply with new laws (e.g., GDPR, CCPA, or local data protection laws).
- Addition of new features that require collecting additional types of data (for example, if we add a location sharing feature).
- Clarification of how data is used in AI or machine learning technologies.
- Updating the contact information of our Data Protection Officer.

 What never changes: 
- We will never sell your personal data. This is fixed and will not change.
- We will not share your data with third parties without your explicit consent.
- You will always be able to access, modify, or delete your data at any time.

 How to object to changes: 
If you do not agree with any material change to the privacy policy, you can delete your account within the 30‑day period before the change takes effect. Your data will be handled according to the previous policy until the account is deleted.

For full details, we recommend reading the complete privacy policy document, which is available as a downloadable PDF. You may also request a printed copy by mail (printing and shipping fees may apply).

Last updated: 2025-03-01. Next scheduled review: 2025-09-01.

static_quickstart_1.title: Create a New Account – Step by Step (Comprehensive Guide)
static_quickstart_1.content:
To start using Bo Chat, follow these detailed steps: 

 Step 1: Download the app 
- Download the app from your phone's official store:
  - For iOS devices: Apple App Store.
  - For Android devices: Google Play Store.
- Make sure the developer is "Panda Oracle IT Company" and the app name is "Bo Chat".

 Step 2: Open the app and tap 'Create Account' 
- After installation, open the app.
- The welcome screen will appear. Tap the 'Create Account' button at the bottom.

 Step 3: Enter basic information 
- Enter your email address (make sure it is correct because it will be used for account confirmation and password recovery).
- Enter your mobile phone number with the country code (e.g., +1 for the USA).
- Then create a strong password. It should contain:
  - At least 8 characters (preferably 12).
  - Uppercase and lowercase letters.
  - Numbers and special symbols.
  - Do not use common words or personal information.
- Repeat the password to confirm.

 Step 4: Agree to the terms 
- Read the Privacy Policy and Terms of Use.
- Check the box to agree.

 Step 5: Confirm your email 
- A confirmation email containing a link will be sent to your email address.
- Click the link to activate your account.
- If the email does not arrive after 5 minutes:
  - Check your Spam folder.
  - Use the 'Resend verification code' option inside the app.
  - Make sure you entered the correct email address.

 Step 6: Set up your profile 
- After activation, you will need to choose a unique username. It can contain letters, numbers, and underscores, 3-20 characters long.
- You can add a profile picture (optional) by tapping the camera icon.
- You can write a short bio about yourself.

 Step 7: Get started 
- After completing these steps, you are now ready to start using Bo Chat!
- You can add friends by searching by email or phone number.
- You can create group chats and use various features.

 Common issues and solutions: 
-  'Email already in use' : This means you already have an account. Try to log in instead of creating a new account, or use 'Forgot password'.
-  Did not receive verification email? : Wait a few minutes, then check your Spam folder. If still not received, use the 'Resend verification code' option.
-  Problem verifying phone number? : Make sure you entered the correct country code and that your phone receives SMS messages.
-  Error 'Weak password' : Follow the strong password guidelines above.

If you face any other issue, our support team is ready to help via live chat or email at support@bo-chat.space.

static_quickstart_2.title: Login and Password Recovery – Complete Guide
static_quickstart_2.content:
Logging into your account: 
1. Open the app.
2. Enter your email and password in the designated fields.
3. If two‑factor authentication (2FA) is enabled, enter the 6‑digit code:
   - Either from your authenticator app (Google Authenticator or Authy).
   - Or the code sent via SMS to your phone.
4. Tap 'Log in'.

 If you forgot your password (account recovery): 
- Tap 'Forgot password' below the login screen.
- Enter the email address associated with your account.
- You will receive an email containing a link to reset your password.
- Click the link (valid for one hour).
- Enter a new strong password (twice for confirmation).
- After changing, you will be notified via your old email address.
- You can now log in with your new password.

 Important tips: 
- Use a password different from those used on other services.
- Do not share the password reset link with anyone.
- If the reset email does not arrive:
  - Check your Spam folder.
  - Make sure you entered the correct email address.
  - Wait two minutes and try again.
- If you cannot access your old email address, contact support to verify your identity.

 Additional problems and solutions: 
-  'Email or password incorrect' :
  - Make sure Caps Lock is off.
  - Try typing the password manually instead of copy‑pasting.
  - If you have completely forgotten your password, use 'Forgot password'.
-  'Account disabled' : This can happen after several failed attempts. Wait 15 minutes and try again, or contact support.
-  2FA issue :
  - If you lost your phone, use the backup codes you saved when enabling 2FA.
  - If you also lost the backup codes, contact support to reset 2FA.

 Security after logging in: 
- After each login, check the 'Active Sessions' list in settings to ensure no unknown devices are connected.
- Enable security alerts to receive a notification on any new login.
- If you suspect your account has been compromised, change your password immediately and log out of all devices.

static_quickstart_3.title: Start a New Conversation and Send Files – Quick & Detailed Guide
static_quickstart_3.content:
Starting a one‑on‑one conversation: 
1. Tap the '+' icon (or the new conversation icon) on the home screen.
2. Start typing the username, email, or phone number of the person you want to talk to.
3. A list of results will appear; select the right person.
4. Type your message in the bottom text box and tap the send button (paper plane icon).

 Starting a group conversation: 
1. Tap the '+' icon, then choose 'Group conversation'.
2. Select group members from your friends list (you can select 2‑500 people).
3. Give the group a name (optional, but recommended for easy identification).
4. You can also add a group picture by tapping the camera icon.
5. Tap 'Create'.

 Searching for new users: 
- Use the search bar on the home screen to find users.
- You can search by name, email, or phone number.
- If the user has a public account, they will appear in the results.
- You can send a contact request.

 Sending different types of content: 
-  Text : Up to 5000 characters.
-  Images and videos : Tap the attachment icon  choose 'Gallery' or 'Camera'. Maximum file size is 100 MB. You can send up to 10 files at once.
-  Documents : Tap the attachment icon > 'Document' and choose a PDF, Word, Excel, PowerPoint, or text file.
-  Stickers : Tap the smiley face icon to choose a sticker from the library. You can download additional sticker packs.
-  Voice messages : Press and hold the microphone icon (🎙️) to record a voice message (up to one minute). Release your finger to send, or slide left to cancel.
-  Location : Tap the attachment icon > 'Location' to share your current location (you can choose the location accuracy).

 Managing conversations: 
-  Pin a conversation : Swipe left on the conversation and select 'Pin' to keep it at the top of the list.
-  Mute notifications : Long‑press the conversation > 'Mute notifications' and choose the duration.
-  Delete a conversation : Swipe right on the conversation > 'Delete' (note: this deletes the conversation only from your device).
-  Search inside a conversation : Open the conversation > tap the three dots > 'Search'.

 Tips: 
- All messages and files are automatically encrypted to protect your privacy.
- To reply to a specific message, long‑press it and choose 'Reply'.
- To forward a message, long‑press it and choose 'Forward', then select the recipient.
- Sent messages can be deleted for everyone within 5 minutes of sending.

If you encounter any difficulty, our support team is ready to assist you.

static_features_1.title: Smart Replies & Auto Suggestions – Advanced Guide
static_features_1.content:
Our app uses advanced AI technologies to suggest quick and smart replies based on the conversation context. Save time and tap the appropriate response directly. This feature is available in both Arabic and English.

 How smart replies work: 
- A specially trained language model analyzes the last 10-15 messages in the conversation.
- It understands the context (question, request, confirmation, thanks, etc.).
- It suggests 3-5 short, appropriate replies (e.g., 'Thanks', 'Agreed', 'I'll check', 'More details?').
- Suggestions appear directly above the keyboard.

 When are they useful? 
- In fast-paced conversations that don't require detailed responses.
- When you're busy and want to reply quickly.
- For new users who don't know what to write.
- For repetitive replies like 'Yes', 'No', 'Thanks'.

 Customizing suggestions: 
You can teach the model your own style through:
- Settings > AI > Customize Replies.
- Replies you use frequently will be automatically prioritized.
- You can disable certain types of suggestions (e.g., only emojis).

 Privacy & Security: 
- Messages are analyzed locally on your device (unless you choose cloud processing).
- Cloud processing can be disabled in Settings > Privacy.
- We do not use your conversation data to train models without your explicit consent.

 Advanced settings: 
- Number of suggestions: 3, 4, or 5.
- Suggestion language: Automatic (based on conversation) or manual.
- Suggestion timing: Immediate or after typing the first two characters.

 Currently supported languages:  Arabic, English, French. More coming soon.

 Tips: 
- The more you use the app, the more accurate the suggestions become.
- You can dismiss suggestions by tapping outside them.
- Suggestions do not appear in very large group chats (over 50 participants) for performance reasons.

static_features_2.title: Advanced Voice Search – Complete Guide
static_features_2.content:
You can now use voice search to quickly find conversations and files. Just tap the microphone icon and speak your search term. The system recognizes different dialects.

 How to use voice search: 
1. On the main search screen, tap the microphone icon (🎙️).
2. Wait until the text 'Listening...' appears.
3. Speak clearly your search word or phrase (e.g., 'Messages from Ahmed' or 'Photos from last week').
4. Results appear instantly – you can tap any result to go to it.

 What you can search for by voice: 
- Contact names (e.g., 'Conversation with Sara').
- Keywords inside messages (e.g., 'Meeting appointment').
- File types (e.g., 'Photos from January', 'Videos').
- Dates (e.g., 'Messages from last week', 'May 2025').
- Links (e.g., 'Link sent last week').

 Voice recognition accuracy: 
- Up to 98% for Modern Standard Arabic.
- 95% for Egyptian and Gulf dialects.
- 97% for English and European languages.
- You can train the system on your voice for better accuracy (Settings > Voice > Train Model).
- A quiet environment significantly improves accuracy.

 Supported languages:  Arabic, English, Spanish, French, German.

 Requirements and settings: 
- Requires an internet connection for voice processing (secure servers).
- Voice recordings are deleted immediately after processing and never stored.
- You can completely disable voice search from Privacy Settings.
- Data usage: approximately 0.5 MB per short voice query.

 Troubleshooting: 
-  My voice wasn't recognized? : Speak more clearly, reduce background noise, or raise your voice slightly.
-  No results appeared? : Try different search terms or check your internet connection.
-  Microphone not working? : Make sure you have granted microphone permission to the app in your phone's settings.

 Additional tips: 
- Use voice search in quiet places for best results.
- You can combine voice search with text search (mixed results).
- Save custom commands for frequent searches (Settings > Voice > Custom Commands).

static_features_3.title: Message Scheduling & Smart Reminders – Comprehensive Guide
static_features_3.content:
Write your message now and set a time to send it later. Smart reminders alert you about important tasks and appointments based on your conversation content. You can manage all schedules from the dashboard.

 Scheduling messages: 
1. Type your message as usual in the text box.
2. Instead of tapping send, press and hold the send button.
3. Choose 'Schedule' from the pop-up menu.
4. Select the desired date and time (you can schedule up to one year in advance).
5. Choose a repetition option if desired:
   - No repeat (once).
   - Daily (same time every day).
   - Weekly (select days of the week).
   - Monthly (same day each month).
   - Yearly (for annual occasions).
6. Tap 'Schedule'.
7. Scheduled messages will appear in the 'Scheduled' section (clock icon in the side menu).

 Smart reminders (automatic): 
- The system analyzes your conversations to detect any mention of a deadline or task.
- Examples of triggering phrases:
  - 'I'll send the report tomorrow morning' → suggests a reminder for tomorrow at 9 AM.
  - 'Don't forget the meeting on Wednesday' → reminder on Wednesday at 8 AM.
  - 'Review the request within an hour' → reminder after one hour.
- You can accept the suggestion with one tap (reminder is added automatically).
- You can reject the suggestion or modify the time before accepting.

 Managing schedules and reminders: 
- Central dashboard showing:
  - Scheduled messages (pending).
  - Upcoming reminders.
  - Date and time for each.
- You can edit any of them (change time, repeat pattern, or content).
- You can unschedule any message before its sending time.
- Notifications 5 minutes before a scheduled message is sent or a reminder is due.

 Limits: 
- Maximum of 50 active scheduled messages.
- Can schedule up to one year in advance.
- Unlimited recurring messages.
- Maximum scheduled message length: 5000 characters.

 Privacy: 
- Smart reminders are processed locally if you use local processing.
- You can completely disable smart reminders (Settings > AI > Reminders).

 Practical tips: 
- Use message scheduling to send greetings on occasions without forgetting.
- Schedule reminder messages to yourself (send a message to yourself).
- For groups, you can schedule weekly messages like 'Status report'.

static_features_4.title: Instant Conversation Translation – Advanced Guide
static_features_4.content:
Translate messages to and from over 20 languages with one tap. Translation happens inside the app without opening an external browser. It supports text and images that contain text.

 How to translate: 
1. When you receive a message in a language you don't understand, a translation icon (🌐) will appear next to it.
2. Tap the icon to see the translation below the original message.
3. You can also translate your message before sending:
   - Type your message.
   - Press and hold the send button.
   - Choose 'Translate'.
   - Select the target language.
   - You will see a preview of the translation before sending.
4. For continuous translation, enable 'Auto‑translate' in Settings.

 Supported languages (22 languages): 
Arabic, English, French, Spanish, German, Italian, Portuguese, Russian, Chinese (Simplified & Traditional), Japanese, Korean, Turkish, Persian, Urdu, Hindi, Dutch, Polish, Swedish, Czech, Greek, Hebrew, Thai.

 Image translation: 
- If an image contains text (sign, document, screenshot):
  - Long‑press the image.
  - Choose 'Translate text'.
  - The system will recognize the text in the image (OCR) and translate it.
  - Handwritten text is supported to a limited extent (lower accuracy).
  - You can copy or share the translated text.

 Live voice call translation: 
- During a voice call, you can enable 'Live translation'.
- Spoken words will be displayed as translated text on screen.
- Available for more than 10 languages.
- May cause a slight delay (1-2 seconds).

 Customizing translation: 
-  Source language : Automatic (detected) or manual.
-  Target language : Choose your preferred language.
-  Translation mode : Manual (on demand), auto for all messages, or auto for foreign languages only.
-  Save translation : You can save translations locally on your device for later reference.

 Accuracy and quality: 
- Up to 92% accuracy for European languages (English, French, Spanish, German).
- 85% accuracy for Asian languages (Chinese, Japanese, Korean).
- 88% accuracy for Arabic and Semitic languages.
- Continuous improvement based on user feedback and modern translation models.

 Privacy: 
- Translation is done via secure encrypted servers (no retention of texts).
- You can use 'Local translation' mode if you prefer not to send texts to the cloud (but it is less accurate and requires downloading language packs – about 500 MB per language).
- We do not use your messages to train translation models.

 Tips: 
- For better translation, avoid abbreviations and spelling errors.
- Short texts (under 100 characters) are more accurate.
- You can suggest better translations to improve the model via Settings.

static_personalize_1.title: Customizing Theme and Fonts – Comprehensive Guide
static_personalize_1.content:
Changing the app theme (Light/Dark/System): 
You can easily switch the app theme to suit your visual comfort or lighting conditions. Go to Settings > Appearance > App Theme, and choose one of the following:
-  Light theme : Suitable for high ambient light, bright colors and white background.
-  Dark theme : Ideal for nighttime use or low light, reduces eye strain and saves battery life (especially on AMOLED screens).
-  System default : Automatically follows your phone's system theme.

 Benefits of dark mode: 
- Reduces eye strain by up to 40% in low light.
- Saves battery consumption by 15-30% on AMOLED screens.
- Improves contrast for night reading.

 Customizing fonts and sizes: 
In Settings > Customize Font, you can:
-  Font type : Choose from Cairo (default), Tahoma, Arial, or download additional fonts (e.g., Noto Sans, Open Sans).
-  Font size : Ranges from 14px (small) to 28px (large). Use the slider to preview the size in real time.
-  Line spacing : Normal (1.4), wide (1.8), compact (1.2) – helpful for readability.
-  Letter spacing : Fine adjustment for comfort.
-  Weight : Normal, bold, italic.

 Customizing chat background: 
-  Solid color : Choose from a palette of 24 colors.
-  Background images : A library of 15 ready‑to‑use images (landscapes, abstract, etc.).
-  Upload your own image : You can use any photo from your gallery as a chat background.
-  Blur effect : Apply 10-50% blur to the background to make text more readable.

 Chat bubbles: 
-  Bubble shape : Rounded (radius 8-20px), square (0px), or with shadow.
-  Bubble colors : You can customize your bubble color separately from the other person's bubble color (choose from the color palette).
-  Text color : Optional (dark or light depending on theme).

 Reset to default: 
One button at the bottom of the customization page restores all theme and font settings to their original state.

 Sync across devices: 
Your theme and font preferences are saved to your account, so your settings will appear the same on your phone, tablet, and desktop (if using the web app).

 Additional tips: 
- Schedule dark mode automatically: You can enable dark mode from sunset to sunrise (Settings > Appearance > Schedule Theme).
- The 'Cairo' font is specifically designed for Arabic and provides the best readability.
- If you have visual difficulties, choose high‑contrast theme from Settings > Accessibility.

static_personalize_2.title: Managing Notifications, Pinning Chats, and Tags – Complete Guide
static_personalize_2.content:
Custom notifications per conversation: 
You have full control over how each conversation notifies you. Tap the conversation name > 'Notifications', and you will find:
-  Mute : Duration: 1 hour, 8 hours, 24 hours, until turned off, or permanently. While muted, no sound or vibration will occur (messages arrive silently).
-  Custom notification sound : Choose a tone from your device library or upload a short audio file (up to 5 seconds, MP3 or M4R).
-  Message preview :
  - Show full text (default).
  - Show only 'New message' (privacy).
  - Hide preview on lock screen (only appears after unlocking).
-  Group notifications : Additional options for groups:
  - Only when mentioned (@).
  - All messages (default).
  - Only direct messages (not replies to others).

 Global Do Not Disturb schedule: 
In Settings > Notifications > Do Not Disturb, set specific hours (e.g., 11 PM – 7 AM) where you receive no notifications from any conversation (important conversations can be excluded).

 Pinning important chats and messages: 
-  Pin a chat : Swipe left on the chat and choose 'Pin' to keep it at the top of the chat list. You can pin up to 5 chats (you can rearrange them by dragging). Unpin the same way.
-  Pin a specific message : Inside any conversation, long‑press a message then choose 'Pin'. The pinned message will appear at the top of the conversation; only one message per conversation can be pinned (new one replaces the old).
-  Pin a file or media : Same method – it will appear in the 'Pinned' tab inside the conversation.
-  Quick access : The side menu has a 'Pinned' section showing all pinned conversations and messages across the app.

 Creating custom conversation tags: 
Organize your conversations into custom folders.
-  Create a tag : Settings > Manage Tags > '+'. Enter a name (e.g., 'Work', 'Family', 'Friends', 'Projects'), choose a color and icon, then save.
-  Add conversations : From the chat list, long‑press a conversation > 'Move to tag', or from inside the conversation > Settings > Tag.
-  View tags : In the side menu, tags appear as collapsible folders. Untagged conversations appear under 'Default'.
-  Manage tags : Edit name/color, delete a tag (conversations are not deleted, they move back to 'Default'), merge two tags.

 Customizing the sidebar and shortcuts: 
-  Reorder icons : Open the side menu > tap 'Edit' at the bottom. Drag an icon up or down to change order, or tap the eye icon to hide/show an icon. Available items: Chats, Contacts, Groups, Files, Settings, Notifications, Help & Support.
-  Add shortcuts for frequent conversations : Inside a conversation, choose 'Add shortcut to menu' – the conversation icon will appear in the side menu for quick access.
-  Reset : 'Reset to default' button restores the menu order to its original state.

 Practical tips: 
- Use tags to organize conversations by projects or priorities.
- Pinning the most important chats prevents them from being buried under new messages.
- Custom notification sounds per conversation help you know who is messaging without looking at your phone.
- All customization settings are synced across your devices.

static_account_1.title: Updating Email and Password – Complete Guide
static_account_1.content:
Updating your email address: 
To change the email associated with your account, follow these steps:
1. Go to Settings > Account > Email.
2. Enter the new email address you wish to use.
3. An immediate confirmation email will be sent to the new address containing an activation link.
4. Click the link within 24 hours (expiration).
5. After confirmation, the new email becomes your primary account email.
6. You will receive a notification on your old email that the email has been changed (for security reasons).

 Important notes: 
- You can change your email address no more than once every 90 days.
- During the change process, you can still log in with your old email until the new one is confirmed.
- If you don’t receive the confirmation email, check your spam folder or use 'Resend'.

 Changing your password: 
1. Go to Settings > Account > Password.
2. Enter your current password (to verify your identity).
3. Enter a new password (must meet strength criteria: at least 8 characters, uppercase/lowercase letters, numbers, special symbols).
4. Re‑enter the new password to confirm.
5. Tap 'Save'.
6. You will be logged out of all other devices (for security reasons) and need to log in again with the new password.

 Security tips: 
- Do not use a password that you have used on any other service.
- Change your password every 6‑12 months.
- Enable two‑factor authentication (2FA) for extra protection.
- Never share your password with anyone, including support staff.

 What if you forget your current password? 
Use 'Forgot password' on the login screen. You will receive a reset link to your registered email.

static_account_2.title: Privacy Settings: Who Sees My Information? – Full Control Guide
static_account_2.content:
You have precise control over your account privacy from Settings > Privacy. Here are all the available options:

 General visibility: 
-  Profile picture : Choose who can see your picture:
  - Everyone (even non‑logged‑in users).
  - Friends only.
  - No one (a default avatar will be shown).
-  Last seen status :
  - Everyone: shows the last time you were active.
  - Friends only.
  - No one (others will see 'Offline').
-  'Typing...' status : Show to everyone, show to friends only, or hide.
-  Read receipts :
  - Enabled: others see that you have read their message.
  - Disabled: others do not see read receipts (and you will not see theirs).

 Advanced privacy: 
-  Adding me to groups :
  - Everyone: anyone can add you to a group.
  - Friends only.
  - No one: you must manually approve each invitation.
-  Phone number : Always hidden from other users. Only visible to support when necessary.
-  Email address : Always hidden.

 Hide account from search: 
- Enable this option to make your account unsearchable (both within the app and via external search engines).
- Even if enabled, people who know your email or phone number can still add you.

 Block list: 
You can block specific users:
- Blocked users cannot message you.
- They cannot see your profile picture, status, or last seen.
- They are not notified that they have been blocked.
To manage blocked users: Settings > Privacy > Blocked.

 Enhanced privacy mode: 
'Private mode' hides your online status from all contacts (you will appear offline). However, you will also not see others' status. Enable it from Settings > Privacy > Private Mode.

 Tips: 
- Review your privacy settings regularly, especially after major app updates.
- If you are concerned about harassment, enable 'No one' for adding to groups and block annoying users.
- Hiding 'Last seen' prevents others from knowing your activity, but may erode trust with friends.

static_account_3.title: Permanently Delete Account – Warning and Procedure
static_account_3.content:
If you decide to permanently delete your account, follow these steps: 
1. Go to Settings > Account > Delete Account.
2. You will be asked to enter your password to confirm.
3. Read the warning carefully, then tap 'Permanently Delete'.

 What happens immediately after deletion? 
- Your account is instantly disabled – you cannot log in.
- All your messages, files, and profile data are marked for deletion.
- Your name is removed from others' friend lists (appears as 'Deleted user').
- All active subscriptions are automatically canceled (no further renewals).

 30‑day grace period to undo: 
You have a 30‑day grace period from the deletion request:
- If you log in during this period, the deletion request is automatically canceled and your account is fully restored.
- During the grace period, you can export your data (Settings > Account > Export Data) before it is permanently deleted.
- After 30 days, all data is permanently deleted and cannot be recovered in any way.

 Exceptions (data that may remain): 
- Basic logs (IP address, registration date, payment history) may be kept for up to one year for legal and fraud prevention purposes.
- Messages you sent to others may remain in their conversations but without your name (appears as 'Deleted user').
- Files you shared may remain on others' devices or in their cloud storage.

 Alternatives to deleting your account: 
- If you only want a break, you can 'Temporarily disable account' (Settings > Account > Disable). When disabled, your account becomes invisible to others, but you can re‑enable it at any time by logging in.
- You can also 'Unlink social media accounts' instead of fully deleting.

 Important warning: 
Account deletion is final and irreversible after 30 days. Make sure to download any data or files you wish to keep before starting the deletion process. If you have an active paid subscription, no refunds will be given for the remaining period.

static_account_4.title: Enable Security Alerts and Manage Active Sessions
static_account_4.content:
Enabling Security Alerts: 
To protect your account from unauthorized access, enable security alerts:
1. Go to Settings > Security > Login Alerts.
2. Enable 'Notify me when logging in from a new device'.
3. Choose notification method: Email, in‑app notification, or SMS.
4. You can also enable 'Notify me on password change' and 'Notify me on email change'.

 What happens when alerts are enabled? 
Whenever a login attempt occurs from a device or browser you haven't used before, you will receive an immediate notification containing:
- Device type (phone, computer, tablet).
- Operating system and browser.
- Approximate location (city and country – based on IP address).
- Time and date.

 What to do if you receive a suspicious alert? 
- If it was you logging in, you can ignore the alert or mark the device as 'Trusted' to avoid future alerts.
- If it wasn't you, tap 'This wasn't me', which will:
  - Immediately log out that device.
  - Prompt you to change your password.
  - Notify you to log out of all devices.

 Managing Active Sessions: 
From Settings > Security > Active Sessions, you can:
- See a list of all devices currently connected to your account.
- For each session: device type, operating system, browser, approximate location, last activity time.
-  Remote logout:  Tap any untrusted device and choose 'Log out'.
-  Log out of all devices:  One button to end all current sessions (except the current one).
-  Mark as trusted device:  If you use a device frequently, mark it as 'Trusted' to reduce alerts.

 Session limits: 
- Up to 10 simultaneous active sessions are allowed.
- If you exceed the limit, you will be prompted to log out of some older sessions.

 Additional security tips: 
- Review the active sessions list weekly to detect any unknown devices.
- If you use a public device (library, café), make sure to log out after use.
- Enable two‑factor authentication (2FA) for extra protection – even if someone steals your password, they cannot enter without the code.
- Never share verification codes with anyone, even if they claim to be from support.

static_1.title: Subscription Plans and Pricing – Complete Guide
static_1.content:
We offer a variety of monthly and yearly subscription plans to suit your needs and budget:

 Basic Plan – $5/month or $48/year (20% discount): 
- Fewer ads (only one ad per week).
- Cloud storage: 1 GB.
- Email support (reply within 48 hours).
- Dark/light theme toggling.

 Premium Plan – $12/month or $115/year (20% discount): 
- No ads at all.
- Cloud storage: 10 GB.
- 24/7 live chat support.
- Exclusive stickers and extra emoji library.
- Advanced smart replies and instant translation features.
- Unlimited message scheduling.

 Pro Plan – $20/month or $192/year (20% discount): 
- All Premium features.
- Unlimited cloud storage (fair use: up to 500 GB per month).
- Advanced conversation analytics (activity analysis, peak times, most used words).
- Full AI features (sentiment analysis, advanced contextual suggestions).
- Unlimited conversation tags.
- Priority support (response within 15 minutes).

 Additional discounts: 
-  Students and educational institutions : 50% discount after verifying educational email (.edu or equivalent).
-  Non‑profit organizations : 40% discount after submitting documents.
-  Referrals : Invite friends – you and your friend get 10% off for 3 months.

 How to subscribe: 
1. Open the app and tap the side menu.
2. Select 'Subscriptions' or 'Bo Chat Pro'.
3. Browse plans and choose the one that suits you.
4. Select a payment method (credit card, PayPal, e‑wallet).
5. Enter required payment details.
6. Confirm the transaction – the plan will activate immediately.

 Refund Policy: 
You can request a full refund within 7 days of subscription date if you have not used any paid features (i.e., not sent messages using premium features or uploaded files to cloud storage). After 7 days or after using the features, no refund is possible.

 Important notes: 
- Monthly subscriptions auto‑renew every month; yearly renew every year. You can cancel renewal at any time.
- Prices include VAT according to your country's regulations.
- If you upgrade from one plan to another, the difference is calculated proportionally.
- All payments are encrypted and secure via certified payment gateways (Stripe, PayPal).

static_2.title: Cancelling Auto‑Renewal, Payment Methods, and Billing Management
static_2.content:
Cancelling auto‑renewal: 
If you do not want your subscription to renew automatically, follow these steps:
1. Go to Settings > My Subscriptions.
2. Select your active plan.
3. Tap 'Cancel Subscription' or 'Cancel auto‑renewal'.
4. Confirm cancellation.

 What happens after cancellation? 
- Paid features continue until the end of the current billing period.
- No further charges will be made after the period ends.
- You can re‑subscribe at any time from the same page.
- If you cancel by accident, you can reactivate before the expiration date without losing remaining time.

 Cancelling via app stores (if subscribed through Apple/Google): 
-  iOS (Apple App Store) : Settings > [Your name] > Subscriptions > Bo Chat > Cancel Subscription.
-  Android (Google Play) : Google Play Store > top‑right three dots > Subscriptions > Bo Chat > Cancel Subscription.

 Supported payment methods: 
We support multiple secure payment methods:
-  Credit / debit cards : Visa, Mastercard, American Express (globally supported).
-  E‑wallets : PayPal, Stripe.
-  Local e‑wallets : Vodafone Cash (Egypt), Orange Money (Egypt), STC Pay (Saudi Arabia), CashU (UAE).
-  Bank transfer : For institutional accounts and large annual subscriptions (minimum $500).

 Managing payment methods: 
- Add multiple cards/wallets.
- Set a default payment method.
- Delete any payment method (as long as it is not used for an active subscription).
- Update card expiration date or number.

 Invoices and transaction history: 
- View all past invoices from Settings > My Subscriptions > Billing History.
- Download each invoice as a PDF.
- An invoice notification is automatically sent to your email after every payment.

 Problem: Amount deducted but subscription not activated 
- Wait 5‑10 minutes (payment gateway may have a delay).
- Check the transaction log in the app (Settings > My Subscriptions > Billing History).
- If the transaction appears as 'pending', retry after 10 minutes.
- If the transaction does not appear at all, contact support with a payment receipt (screenshot from bank or email).

 Frequently asked questions: 
-  Can I change payment method after subscribing?  Yes, from Settings > My Subscriptions > Payment Methods.
-  What if my card expires before renewal?  We will attempt to charge again after 3 days. If attempts fail, the subscription will be canceled automatically and you will be notified.
-  Can I pay in a currency other than USD?  Currency conversion happens automatically at the daily exchange rate. You can view prices in your local currency on the subscription screen.

static_3.title: Available Payment Methods and Subscription Troubleshooting
static_3.content:
Detailed payment methods supported: 
We offer a wide range of payment methods to make subscription easy for all users:

 1. Credit/Debit Cards: 
- Visa, Mastercard, and American Express.
- Card data is encrypted using PCI DSS Level 1 – the highest security standard.
- We do not store full card numbers on our servers (only last 4 digits for identification).

 2. PayPal: 
- You can link your PayPal account and pay with one click.
- You are redirected to PayPal to complete the payment – we never receive your login credentials.
- PayPal supports over 200 countries.

 3. Local e‑wallets (region‑specific): 
-  Egypt : Vodafone Cash, Orange Money, We Cash.
-  Saudi Arabia : STC Pay, Urpay.
-  UAE : CashU.
-  Kuwait : KNET.
- These are only available to users in those countries.

 4. Bank transfer (for enterprises and large subscriptions): 
- Minimum transfer: $500.
- Requires contacting our sales team at sales@bo-chat.space to arrange the invoice.
- After transfer, activation may take 1‑3 business days.

 How to add a new payment method: 
1. Settings > My Subscriptions > Payment Methods.
2. Tap '+' or 'Add payment method'.
3. Choose type (card, PayPal, local e‑wallet).
4. Enter required details.
5. A small amount ($0.50) will be charged to verify the card, then immediately refunded.

 Changing payment method for an active subscription: 
- If you have multiple payment methods, you can set a default method for the subscription.
- The default method will be charged on renewal.
- You can change the default method at any time.

 Payment troubleshooting: 
-  Card declined : Make sure you have sufficient balance, the card supports online payments, and the expiry date is correct. Try a different card.
-  'Authentication failed' error : Your card's two‑factor authentication may have failed. Contact your bank to enable secure verification.
-  Payment pending for over an hour : There may be a temporary technical issue. Retry after 30 minutes. If the problem persists, use another payment method or contact support.
-  Amount deducted but features not activated : Wait up to 15 minutes (syncing may take time). If not activated, send a screenshot of your bank statement to support@bo-chat.space.

 Getting an official tax invoice: 
- After each payment, you can request a tax invoice.
- Go to Settings > My Subscriptions > Billing History > select the transaction > 'Request tax invoice'.
- The invoice will be sent to your email within 24 hours.
- Make sure your tax details (name, address, tax number) are correctly entered in Settings.

 Practical tips: 
- Keep a record of invoices in your account for accounting purposes.
- Enable renewal notifications 7 days before the renewal date (Settings > My Subscriptions > Notifications).
- If you face recurring issues, use an alternative payment method and contact support to refund any erroneous charges.

static_ambassador_1.title: What is the Bo Chat Ambassador Program? – Comprehensive Overview
static_ambassador_1.content:
The Bo Chat Ambassador Program is an exclusive initiative aimed at building a network of influencers and distinguished users who contribute to spreading the app's culture and increasing awareness in local and global communities.

 Program objectives: 
- Expand the user base through personal recommendations.
- Gather real feedback from active users to improve the app.
- Build a community of passionate supporters who share their success stories.
- Provide added value to ambassadors through exclusive rewards and training.

 Who can join? 
- Active Bo Chat users who are passionate about technology and communication.
- Social media influencers (Instagram, TikTok, Twitter, YouTube).
- Tech bloggers and reviewers.
- Group and community leaders on various platforms.

 Program duration: 
- The program is ongoing (no specific end date).
- Ambassadors can continue as long as they maintain the required activity level.
- Performance is reviewed every 3 months for membership renewal.

 What makes the program special? 
- Direct relationship with the Bo Chat development team.
- Early access to new features before official release.
- Opportunity to influence the future of the app through suggestions.

Join us to become an influential voice in the Bo Chat community and help spread the culture of privacy and secure communication.

static_ambassador_2.title: Ambassador Program Requirements – Acceptance Guide
static_ambassador_2.content:
To become a certified ambassador in the Bo Chat Ambassador Program, you must meet the following requirements:

 Basic requirements: 
- Have an active Bo Chat account for at least 3 months.
- No prior violations (reports, bans, inappropriate behavior).
- Regular use of the app (at least 5 days per week).

 Social media requirements: 
- Preferably have at least 500 followers on at least one platform (Instagram, TikTok, Twitter, YouTube).
- Your previous posts must be positive and constructive (no offensive or illegal content).
- Commitment to post content about Bo Chat at least once per week (after acceptance).

 Personal and behavioral requirements: 
- Be enthusiastic about testing new features and providing detailed feedback.
- Ability to respond to new users' questions politely and professionally.
- Commitment to confidentiality of internal app information before public release.
- Attend a monthly online meeting with the program team (one hour).

 Acceptance process: 
1. Submit the application via the dedicated form ('Become an Ambassador' link inside the app).
2. Review of your profile and activity on Bo Chat and social media.
3. Online interview (15-20 minutes) with the program coordinator.
4. If accepted, you will sign a simple ambassador agreement.
5. One‑month trial period to evaluate your performance.
6. After passing the trial period, you become a certified ambassador.

 Exceptions: 
- If you have fewer than 500 followers but are very active in the Bo Chat community, you may be accepted by special decision.
- Major influencers (over 10,000 followers) may go through a simplified process.

 Rejection and reapplication: 
If your application is not accepted, you can reapply after 3 months. We will send you feedback on the reasons for rejection to help you improve your chances.

static_ambassador_3.title: Ambassador Benefits and Rewards – Full Incentive Package
static_ambassador_3.content:
Bo Chat ambassadors receive a variety of benefits and rewards that increase with outstanding performance:

 Basic benefits (for all ambassadors): 
- Free annual subscription to the Premium plan (worth $115).
- Exclusive entry to Bo Chat events (virtual and in‑person when possible).
- 30% discount on the company store (clothing, accessories, stickers).
- Special discount code for followers (10% off subscriptions); you earn a 5% commission on every subscription made through your code.
- Early access to new features before public release.
- Digital official ambassador certificate (downloadable and shareable).

 Monthly financial rewards (performance‑based): 
- Bronze level (basic activity): $50/month – requires 3 posts about Bo Chat, 20 replies to inquiries.
- Silver level (moderate activity): $150/month – requires 7 posts, 50 replies, 5 new user referrals.
- Gold level (high activity): $300/month – requires 15 posts, 100 replies, 15 new user referrals.
- Platinum level (excellent): $500/month – requires 25 posts, 200 replies, 30 new user referrals.

 Additional bonuses: 
-  Best Ambassador of the Quarter : $1,000 extra + a tablet device with Bo Chat logo.
-  Content Innovation Award : $500 for the best creative content idea (video, design, campaign).
-  Referral bonus : $10 for each new ambassador you recommend who gets accepted (up to $300 per month).

 Training and development: 
- Free courses in digital marketing and community management (in partnership with Coursera).
- Monthly training sessions with Bo Chat expert team.
- Opportunity to speak at tech conferences (company‑sponsored).

 Recognition and visibility: 
- Your name listed on the 'Bo Chat Ambassadors' page on our official website.
- Profile picture with ambassador badge inside the app.
- Invitations to company parties and events (for top ambassadors).

 Important notes: 
- Financial rewards are paid via PayPal or bank transfer at the end of each month.
- Performance is automatically evaluated based on your activity on social platforms and within the app.
- If your performance falls below the minimum for two consecutive months, your level may be downgraded or your membership terminated.
- You can leave the program at any time without penalties, but you will lose immediate benefits.

static_ambassador_4.title: How to Apply to Join? – Step‑by‑Step Application Guide
static_ambassador_4.content:
We welcome you to join the Bo Chat Ambassador family. Follow these steps to submit your application:

 Application method 1 (via the app): 
1. Open the Bo Chat app.
2. Go to Settings > Ambassador Program.
3. Tap 'Become an ambassador'.
4. The application form will open.

 Application method 2 (via email): 
Send an email to ambassadors@bo-chat.space containing the following information:
- Subject: '[Your Name] – Application for Ambassador Program'.
- Full name (as registered in the app).
- The email address associated with your Bo Chat account.
- Links to your social media accounts (Instagram, TikTok, Twitter, YouTube, LinkedIn – any you have).
- Follower count on each platform.
- A short paragraph about why you want to join (200‑300 words).
- Attach a screenshot of your Bo Chat profile page showing registration date and activity (personal info can be hidden).

 What happens after applying? 
1.  Initial review stage (3‑5 days): 
   - The program team will receive and review your application.
   - We will verify your account activity and reputation on Bo Chat.
2.  Interview stage (5‑10 days): 
   - We will contact you to schedule an online interview (Google Meet or Zoom).
   - The interview lasts 15‑20 minutes and aims to get to know you better and understand your motivations.
3.  Acceptance stage (1‑3 days after the interview): 
   - We will send you an email with the result of your application.
   - If accepted, we will attach the electronic ambassador agreement (requires your signature).
   - After signing, your ambassador status will be activated within 24 hours.

 Additional information: 
-  Trial period : The first three months will be a trial period with performance monitoring. If you meet the minimum requirements, you become a permanent ambassador.
-  Support : Throughout the program, you will have a direct chat channel with the ambassador coordinator for inquiries.
-  Marketing materials : After acceptance, we will provide you with a set of images, videos, and ready‑to‑post messages.

 Tips for a successful application: 
- Show genuine passion for the app and its features.
- Provide examples of previous content you have created about Bo Chat or similar technologies.
- Be honest and specific in your answers.
- If your following is small, focus on content quality rather than quantity.
- Check your spam folder frequently after applying – our emails may end up there.

We look forward to your joining!

static_invest_1.title: Investment Opportunities and Terms & Conditions – Comprehensive Guide
static_invest_1.content:
We offer several investment opportunities suitable for different capital sizes and investment goals:

 Types of investment available: 
-  Preferred Shares : Grant priority in dividend distribution and capital repayment upon liquidation. Minimum $10,000.
-  Convertible Notes : Short‑term investment (12‑24 months) that converts to shares in the next funding round. Fixed 8% annual return plus conversion option at a 20% discount on the next round's valuation.
-  Revenue Shares : Direct investment in the app's revenues in exchange for a percentage of monthly revenue (2% to 5% depending on investment size).
-  Direct Equity : Purchase of a percentage of company shares. Minimum $50,000.

 Basic terms and conditions: 
-  Minimum investment : $5,000 for preferred shares and convertible notes; $10,000 for revenue shares.
-  Minimum for strategic partner : $100,000 (see separate article).
-  Maturity period : Starts from one year (for shares and notes), with possibility of extension or conversion.
-  Distribution of profits : Preferred share and revenue share dividends are distributed quarterly (January, April, July, October).
-  Reinvestment : Profits can be automatically reinvested to purchase additional units under the same terms.

 Required documents for investment: 
- For individual investors: Copy of national ID or passport, proof of address (recent utility bill), and a source of funds declaration.
- For legal entities: Commercial register, certificate of incorporation, and business license.

 Investment process step by step: 
1. Fill out the expression of interest form (via our website or email).
2. Receive the detailed project prospectus (Pitch Deck) and a Non‑Disclosure Agreement (NDA).
3. Review legal and financial documents with our team or your lawyer.
4. Sign the investment agreement electronically.
5. Transfer the amount to the company's escrow account.
6. A digital investment certificate will be issued within 5 business days.

 Legal and regulatory framework: 
- All investments are protected by contracts approved by the Capital Market Authority (depending on the country).
- Company accounts are audited annually by an international auditing firm (Deloitte or PwC).
- Investors can request quarterly financial reports.

 Frequently asked questions: 
-  Can I invest from outside my country?  Yes, we accept investors from all countries (except those under international sanctions).
-  Are there risks?  As with any investment, there are risks (product failure, market fluctuations). We provide a detailed risk management plan in the project prospectus.
-  How is my money protected?  Funds are held in an escrow account until the minimum funding target is reached. If the target is not met, the full amount is refunded.

You can review the detailed project prospectus by requesting the presentation via email at invest@bo-chat.space.

static_invest_2.title: Investment Returns, Guarantees, and Legal Framework – Investor Guide
static_invest_2.content:
Expected returns: 
The expected annual return ranges between 12% and 18% depending on the type and duration of the investment:
- Preferred shares: 14% - 18% per year (dividends paid quarterly).
- Convertible notes: 8% fixed cash return plus conversion option that can double the return to 15‑25%.
- Revenue shares: 12% - 16% per year (tied to app revenue performance).

 Historical performance (last quarter): 
- Revenue growth of 15% compared to the previous quarter.
- Active user base growth of 22%.
- Expansion into new markets: Saudi Arabia, UAE, Egypt.
- Launch of new paid features (premium subscriptions) contributed to revenue increase.

 Future growth projections: 
- Expansion plan into 3 new countries during 2026 (Kuwait, Qatar, Oman).
- Launch of the Enterprise version, expected to double revenues by 40%.
- Targeting 5 million monthly active users by the end of 2027.
- A 5‑year investment return forecast is available in the project prospectus.

 Legal and financial guarantees: 
-  Capital guarantee fund : We have a reserve fund that covers up to 80% of the investment value (in case of bankruptcy or liquidation, the remaining amount is paid from the fund).
-  Legally binding contracts : All agreements are approved by the Capital Market Authority (depending on jurisdiction) and are enforceable.
-  Full transparency : Investors have access to a dashboard showing investment performance, revenues, and costs in real time.
-  External audit : Accounts are audited annually by an internationally recognized Big Four auditing firm.
-  Inflation protection : Contracts include an automatic return adjustment clause if inflation exceeds 5%.

 Capital redemption procedure: 
- After the maturity period (1‑5 years depending on investment type), you may request redemption of capital together with accrued profits.
- Redemption period: 30 days from the date of request.
- If you request early redemption (before one year), partial fees (5% of the investment value) may apply.

 Tips for investors: 
- Diversify your investments across different types to reduce risk.
- Consult a financial advisor before making a decision.
- Request the quarterly financial report regularly.
- Participate in periodic investor meetings (twice a year online).

To obtain the full prospectus (Financial Model, Pitch Deck, Due Diligence), please contact the investment team.

static_developers_2.title: Source Code and Technical Architecture – Understanding the Stack
static_developers_2.content:
Technology overview: 
-  Frontend : React.js 18 + Vite + Tailwind CSS + React Router v6.
-  Backend : Node.js + Express.js + MongoDB (Mongoose ODM).
-  Authentication : JWT (JSON Web Tokens) with Refresh Token support.
-  Realtime communication : Socket.IO (for instant messaging).
-  State management : Context API + useReducer for global state, React Query for API requests.

 API structure: 
We follow RESTful style with versioning (`v1`) in the path:
- `GET /api/v1/articles` – fetch articles.
- `POST /api/v1/auth/login` – log in.
- `PUT /api/v1/users/profile` – update profile.
- `DELETE /api/v1/users/:id` – delete user (admin only).

All responses follow a unified format:
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "data": { ... },
  "message": "Operation successful"
}
```

 Database schema (summary): 
- `users` – name, email, password (hashed), profile picture, privacy settings.
- `articles` – title, content, category (ctg), images, likes, views.
- `messages` – message text, timestamp, sender and receiver, conversation ID.
- `subscriptions` – plan levels, start and end dates, user ID.

The full database diagram is in `/docs/database_schema.png`.

 Typical API request flow: 
1. The client sends an HTTP request with a JWT in the Authorization header.
2. The `authMiddleware` middleware validates the token and adds the user ID to the request object.
3. In the Controller, business logic is applied (permission checks, queries, data updates).
4. The JSON response is returned to the client.

 Full documentation: 
-  Developer docs : available in the `/docs` folder (Markdown).
-  Interactive API reference : run `npm run docs:api` to start a local Swagger server at http://localhost:3001/api-docs.
-  Code comments : use JSDoc for public functions (see the Coding Standards article below).

For more details, refer to the architecture guide at `/docs/architecture.md`.

static_developers_3.title: How to Contribute (Pull Request) – Contributor Guide
static_developers_3.content:
Thank you for your interest in contributing to Bo Chat! Follow these steps to ensure your contribution is accepted:

 Steps to submit a Pull Request (PR): 
1.  Identify an issue or feature: 
   - Look at the 'Issues' list on GitHub. Search for labels like `good first issue` or `help wanted`.
   - If you plan to add a new feature, open an Issue first to discuss it with the team.
2.  Fork the repository: 
   - Click the 'Fork' button at the top right of the repository page.
3.  Clone your fork locally: 
   ```bash
   git clone https://github.com/your-username/bo-chat-app.git
   cd bo-chat-app
   ```
4.  Create a new branch: 
   - Use a descriptive name that includes the change type and Issue number:
     ```bash
     git checkout -b feature/123-add-dark-mode   # new feature
     git checkout -b fix/456-login-error         # bug fix
     git checkout -b docs/789-update-readme      # documentation
     ```
5.  Make your changes: 
   - Write code following the style guidelines (see the next article).
   - Add tests (at least 80% coverage for new code).
   - Document any public functions using JSDoc.
6.  Commit your changes: 
   - Follow the  Conventional Commits  pattern:
     ```bash
     git commit -m "feat: add dark mode for conversations"
     git commit -m "fix: correct login error with uppercase email"
     git commit -m "docs: improve authentication route documentation"
     ```
   - Commit types: `feat` (new feature), `fix` (bug fix), `docs` (documentation), `style` (formatting), `refactor` (code restructure), `test` (tests), `chore` (build tasks).
7.  Push your changes to GitHub: 
   ```bash
   git push origin feature/123-add-dark-mode
   ```
8.  Create a Pull Request: 
   - Go to the original repository on GitHub.
   - A yellow notification will suggest creating a PR from your latest branch. Click 'Compare & pull request'.
   - Write a descriptive title and a detailed explanation of the changes.
   - Link the Issue by adding `Closes #123` in the description.
   - Add labels such as `enhancement`, `bug`, `documentation`.
   - Assign reviewers (they will be auto‑assigned).

 What happens after submitting a PR? 
- Automated tests (CI) will run to check that the build is not broken and tests pass.
- One of the core team members will review the changes (usually within 3 business days).
- You may be asked to make modifications – respond by amending and pushing additional changes to the same branch.
- After approval, the PR will be merged into the main branch.
- The associated Issue will be closed automatically.

 Tips to increase acceptance chances: 
- Break large changes into a series of small PRs.
- Ensure all tests pass locally before pushing (`npm run test`).
- Explain the *reason* for the change, not just what it does, in the PR description.
- Be responsive to feedback – collaborate respectfully.

 First‑time contributor pathway: 
If this is your first contribution, look for Issues with the `good first issue` label. We welcome questions at dev@bo-chat.space before starting.

static_developers_4.title: Coding Standards and Style Guides – ESLint, Prettier, JSDoc
static_developers_4.content: To maintain clean and consistent code, we follow a set of standards and tools. Please adhere to them in all contributions. Naming and coding style: - JavaScript/React : We follow the Airbnb Style Guide. Please install ESLint and Prettier extensions in your code editor. - Variables and functions : Use camelCase (`userName`, `fetchArticles`). - Constants : Use UPPER_SNAKE_CASE (`MAX_RETRY_COUNT`). - Components : Use PascalCase (`UserProfile`, `ArticleList`). - File names : Use kebab‑case for non‑component folders and files (`article-details.jsx`), and PascalCase for main components (`ArticleDetails.jsx`). Languages and comments: - Variable and function names : Must be in English (clear and descriptive). - Comments : Use English or Arabic, but English is preferred for technical terms. - Documentation for public functions : Use JSDoc as in the example: ```javascript / * Translates text into the target language. * @param {string} text - The text to translate. * @param {string} targetLang - The target language (e.g., 'en', 'ar'). * @returns {Promise} The translated text. */ async function translateText(text, targetLang) { ... } ``` Automated linting and formatting tools: - ESLint : Checks for common errors and enforces style. Configuration file: `.eslintrc.js`. - Run manually: `npm run lint`. - Integrated with most editors (VS Code, WebStorm). - Prettier : Formats spacing, brackets, commas. Configuration file: `.prettierrc`. - Run manually: `npm run format`. - Husky + lint‑staged : We install hooks that automatically run ESLint and Prettier on changed files before each commit. Examples of correct vs incorrect style: ```javascript // Correct const getUserDetails = async (userId) => { if (!userId) throw new Error('User ID is required'); const response = await fetch(`/api/users/${userId}`); return response.json(); }; // Incorrect (spacing, braces, unclear variable name) const get_user_details = async id=> { if(id==null) throw Error("id required"); const res=await fetch(`/api/users/${id}`); return res.json(); } ``` Additional standards: - Avoid `var`; use `const` and `let`. - Use `===` and `!==` instead of `==` and `!=`. - Use arrow functions for short callbacks. - Import order: external libraries, internal libraries, local components, styles. - Maximum line length: 100 characters. HTML/JSX practices: - Use explicit self‑closing tags for elements without children: ``. - Add an `alt` attribute for all images. - Use `className` instead of `class`. If you have any questions about these standards, refer to the `CONTRIBUTING.md` file or open a discussion on GitHub Discussions.
