questions.q: Why was BO CHAT created?
questions.a:
BOCHAT was created to provide a modern and fast communication experience that combines simplicity and intelligence in one place, focusing on making conversations more meaningful and effective in today’s fast-paced digital world.

The platform was developed in response to the need for a messaging application that offers instant and secure communication, while giving users a space for free expression within a structured and transparent environment, without complexity or distraction.

BOCHAT aims to redefine digital messaging by providing smart tools that support natural communication, improve user experience, and maintain privacy, high performance, and ease of use for everyone.

questions.q: Does BO CHAT impose any content moderation or censorship?
questions.a:
BOCHAT does not enforce moderation based on users' opinions or viewpoints. Content is only restricted, removed, or modified when it violates BOCHAT Community Guidelines or applicable laws.

Prohibited behaviors include, but are not limited to, illegal activities, hate speech, harassment, bullying, sexually explicit content that violates guidelines, unauthorized copyrighted material, and any harmful behavior.

Enforcement policies are applied fairly and transparently to ensure a safe and responsible environment for all users.

questions.q: Will BO CHAT apply hidden bans or shadow restrictions on my content?
questions.a:
No, BOCHAT does not apply hidden bans or undisclosed content suppression.

The platform is built on full transparency, and users are informed whenever any action is taken on their content, such as removal or restriction, along with the reason based on community guidelines.

Content is not hidden or reduced based on opinion or viewpoint. Actions are only taken against content that violates rules or laws, such as illegal content, hate speech, harassment, or anything that threatens user or community safety.

BOCHAT also provides clear appeal mechanisms to ensure fairness and transparency.

questions.q: Does BO CHAT share user data with third parties?
questions.a:
BOCHAT does not share user data with third parties for marketing, personal data analysis, or any commercial purposes.

User data is handled with strict confidentiality and security, and is only disclosed when required by applicable law, such as in response to a valid court order or legal obligation.

BOCHAT follows a strict privacy policy designed to protect user data and ensure it is not misused or shared without authorization.

questions.q: What is BO CHAT used for?
questions.a:
BOCHAT provides a comprehensive platform for instant communication, self-expression, and sharing messages and content easily and quickly, while maintaining a safe and organized environment.

The platform aims to enable users to build real and meaningful conversations, both personally and socially, while complying with community guidelines and applicable laws to ensure a responsible and reliable experience.

questions.q: Does BO CHAT use AI or machine learning algorithms to rank content?
questions.a:
BOCHAT does not rely on artificial intelligence or machine learning algorithms to manipulate content ranking in a non-transparent way.

The platform provides a following feed that displays content in strict chronological order from accounts users choose to follow, ensuring a clear and unbiased experience.

The discovery section may use simple and transparent signals such as engagement and recency to help users discover new content, while maintaining transparency and avoiding manipulation of visibility.

questions.q: Is BO CHAT available as a web or desktop application?
questions.a:
Currently, BOCHAT focuses on providing a core experience through its mobile application to ensure the best performance and smooth communication.

A web and desktop version is being considered for future development to expand accessibility and provide a more flexible experience across different devices.

questions.q: Is BO CHAT a news platform?
questions.a:
No, BOCHAT is not a news organization, media outlet, or editorial publisher.

The platform is primarily designed for user communication and content sharing, while users are responsible for the content they publish.

BOCHAT aims to facilitate communication and free expression within a structured environment, without acting as a news distributor or media provider.

questions.q: Is BO CHAT only for activists?
questions.a:
No, BO CHAT is not limited to activists. It is designed for a wide range of users.

The platform serves individuals, creators, businesses, students, and general social media users, providing a flexible space for communication and interaction.

BO CHAT welcomes all users who comply with community guidelines and applicable laws, aiming to build an inclusive and safe communication environment.

questions.q: Is user data encrypted in BOCHAT?
questions.a:
Yes, BOCHAT uses standard encryption technologies to protect user data during transmission (such as TLS) and when stored on servers.

Sensitive data such as passwords is encrypted using modern encryption methods to ensure a high level of security.

Public content within the platform is designed to be accessible to other users depending on its nature, while still being protected during transfer and storage.

Future enhancements may include optional end-to-end encryption for private messages, which will be announced when available.

Despite strong security measures, no system can guarantee absolute protection, so users are responsible for keeping their login credentials secure and using strong passwords.

questions.q: Will BO CHAT pay content creators?
questions.a:
Yes, BO CHAT plans to introduce future tools that enable content creators to monetize their content on the platform.

These tools may include financial rewards, branded content opportunities, and mechanisms that allow communities to directly support creators.

BO CHAT aims to support creativity and encourage high-quality content within the platform.

questions.q: Where can I ask more questions?
questions.a:
For additional inquiries, users can visit the BOCHAT Help Center or contact the official support team through the available in-app or website channels.

The platform also provides a dedicated help section with FAQs and usage guides to help users easily find information.

questions.q: Is BO CHAT free to use?
questions.a: Yes, BO CHAT is free to use, with optional premium features that may be introduced in the future to enhance the experience.

questions.q: Can I delete my BO CHAT account?
questions.a: Yes, users can delete their account at any time through the account settings, and data will be removed according to the privacy policy.

questions.q: How can I report inappropriate content?
questions.a: BO CHAT provides an in-app reporting system that allows users to report any content that violates community guidelines.

questions.q: Can I edit or delete my posts?
questions.a: Yes, users can edit or delete their content at any time through their account management interface.

questions.q: Is BO CHAT safe for children?
questions.a: BO CHAT is committed to providing a safe environment, and additional protection policies may be applied for younger users or inappropriate content.

questions.q: Is the platform updated regularly?
questions.a: Yes, BO CHAT is continuously developed to improve performance, add new features, and enhance the user experience.

6a0312a8723ee85bb71aa310.title: Block User
6a0312a8723ee85bb71aa310.content:
Blocking a user prevents them from seeing your profile, posts, or stories, and stops them from contacting you. It is the most effective way to protect yourself from unwanted interactions.

To block a user:

Go to the user's profile.

Tap ⋮

Select Block → Confirm.

To unblock:

Follow the same steps and choose Unblock.

To manage blocked users:

Go to your profile page.

Tap Settings ⚙️ → Blocked Users.

Important to know:

Users are not notified when they are blocked or unblocked.

After blocking, the user cannot see your posts, stories, or profile, and cannot contact you.

Blocking also removes them from your followers list.

You can unblock at any time if you change your mind.

6a0312c8723ee85bb71aa312.title: Mute User
6a0312c8723ee85bb71aa312.content:
Muting allows you to stop seeing content from specific users in your feed or stories without blocking or unfollowing them. It is a flexible way to manage your experience while keeping your connections.

To mute a user:

Go to the user's profile.

Tap ⋮

Select Mute → Confirm.

To unmute:

Follow the same steps and choose Unmute.

To manage muted users:

Go to your profile page.

Tap Settings ⚙️ → Muted Users.

Important to know:

Users are not notified when they are muted or unmuted.

When you mute someone, their posts and/or stories will be hidden from your feed.

Muting does not affect messages or profile access — the user can still see and interact with your content unless you also block them.

This feature is ideal for managing your feed without creating social tension.

6a0312e8723ee85bb71aa314.title: Hide Content
6a0312e8723ee85bb71aa314.content:
If you come across a post you do not want to see but it does not violate any rules, you can simply hide it. Hiding removes the post from your feed without reporting it or affecting your relationship with the user.

Steps:

Find the post you want to hide.

Tap ⋯ on the post.

Select Hide.

Important to know:

Hidden posts will no longer appear in your feed.

The user will not be notified that you hid their content.

If the content is inappropriate or violates guidelines, you should use the report option instead.

6a03130c723ee85bb71aa316.title: App Permissions in BOCHAT
6a03130c723ee85bb71aa316.content:
The BOCHAT app requires certain permissions from your device to provide a full experience — such as changing your profile picture, posting photos and videos, or adding locations. Permissions vary slightly between iOS and Android.

Below is an explanation of each permission and when it may be requested:

Profile or cover photo change
Gallery/Photos permission → required to choose an image from your device.
Camera permission → required to take a new photo directly in the app.

The app may open the camera by default when changing a photo, but you can refuse and use the gallery instead.

Posting photos
Gallery/Photos permission → required to select images.
Camera permission → required to take photos.

Posting videos
Gallery/Photos permission → required to select videos.
Camera permission → required to record videos.
Microphone permission → required for audio recording in videos.

Location
Location permission → required if you want to tag your current location in posts. You can also add location manually without granting permission.

Notifications
Notification permission → required to receive likes, comments, followers, messages, and other updates.

Important to know:
You are not required to grant all permissions — some features may not work without them.
You can change permissions anytime in your device settings.

6a031333723ee85bb71aa318.title: Report User
6a031333723ee85bb71aa318.content:
Help keep the BOCHAT community safe by reporting users who engage in inappropriate or harmful behavior. Reports allow the moderation team to review accounts and take action.

If someone is bothering you, the fastest way to protect yourself is to block them first, then submit a report if needed.

Steps to report:

1. Go to the user's profile.
2. Tap ⋮ in the top right corner.
3. Select Report.
4. Choose the appropriate reason and submit the report.

Important to know:
Reports are confidential — the user will not know you reported them.
Blocking is immediate and prevents any further interaction.
The moderation team reviews reports according to community guidelines and may take actions such as warnings, restrictions, or account suspension.
Use reporting responsibly.

6a03134c723ee85bb71aa31a.title: Report Content
6a03134c723ee85bb71aa31a.content:
Help keep BOCHAT a safe and respectful platform by reporting posts that violate the rules. Reports allow the moderation team to review content and take appropriate action if needed.

Steps:

Find the post you want to report.

Tap ⋯ on the post.

Select Report.

Choose the most appropriate reason and submit.

Important to know:
Reports are confidential — the post owner will not know you reported it.
The moderation team reviews all reports and may remove content, restrict accounts, or suspend users based on community guidelines.
If a post is simply annoying but not violating rules, you can mute or block instead.

6a031364723ee85bb71aa31c.title: Mention & Tag Preferences
6a031364723ee85bb71aa31c.content:
Mentions (@username) and tags allow other users to reference you in posts, comments, or photos. To protect your experience, you can control who is allowed to mention or tag you.

Options:

Everyone — anyone can mention or tag you.
People you follow — only accounts you follow can mention or tag you.
Off — no one can mention or tag you.

Important to know:
This setting applies to both mentions and tags.
Even if turned off, users can still type your username, but no mention notification will be created.
You can change this setting anytime in your profile settings.

6a03137c723ee85bb71aa31e.title: Message Requests Management
6a03137c723ee85bb71aa31e.content:
Message requests let you control who can send you direct messages. People you follow can always message you directly, while others go to requests.

Options:

Everyone — anyone can send you a message request.
Off — only people you follow can send requests.

Important to know:
People you follow can always message you directly.
There is no reject button — ignoring a request leaves it pending.
Be careful when replying to unknown users, as some messages may be spam or scams.

6a031628723ee85bb71aa36e.title: Log out from all devices
6a031628723ee85bb71aa36e.content:
BOCHAT provides a security feature that allows you to log out from all devices connected to your account at any time through security settings.

Steps:
Open BOCHAT
Go to your profile
Tap Settings ⚙️
Select Security
Tap "Log out from all devices"
Confirm the action

Important:
All active sessions will be terminated immediately.
You will need to log in again on all devices.
This helps protect your account if suspicious activity is detected.

6a03164c723ee85bb71aa375.title: Data Retention Period in BOCHAT
6a03164c723ee85bb71aa375.content:
BOCHAT is committed to protecting user privacy and storing data only for as long as necessary to provide services effectively.

Purpose of data retention:
Operating the platform and core services
Improving user experience
Complying with legal and regulatory requirements

Data deletion or anonymization:
After data is no longer needed, BOCHAT will either:
Permanently delete it securely
Or anonymize it to prevent identification

Retention period varies depending on data type:
Account information
Activity logs
Usage and interaction data

BOCHAT ensures all data is handled securely and transparently to maintain user trust.

6a03170c723ee85bb71aa3b2.title: Create a New Account
6a03170c723ee85bb71aa3b2.content:
How to start using BOCHAT for the first time:
Creating an account on BOCHAT is your gateway to a smooth and enhanced messaging experience. The process is simple and straightforward, allowing you to access all app features.

Steps to create a new account:

Download the app: Search for "BOCHAT" on Google Play or the App Store and install it.

Open the app: Tap the BOCHAT icon to launch it.

Choose a registration method: You will see multiple options to create a new account:

Via phone number: Enter your mobile number, then input the verification code (SMS) sent to you.

Via email: Enter your email address and a password.

Via social accounts: You can quickly sign up using Google, Apple, or Facebook.

Complete your profile: After verification, choose a username and optionally add a profile picture. This is what others will see.

Accept terms: Read the Terms & Conditions and Privacy Policy, then accept to complete registration. Congratulations! You now have a BOCHAT account.

Important to know:

Phone number is not visible: It is only used for verification and will not be shown to other users.

Strong password: It is recommended to use a strong password to protect your account.

Username changes: Changing your username may be limited (e.g., once every 30 days depending on policy). Choose wisely.

Account deletion: If you delete your account later, all messages and data will be permanently lost.

Security warning: Never share your verification code with anyone, even if they claim to be support staff.

6a031734723ee85bb71aa3b4.title: Login to Your Account
6a031734723ee85bb71aa3b4.content:
How to log in to your account
Recover access if you lose your account

Logging into BOCHAT gives you instant access to your chats and settings. You can log in easily using the same method you used to create your account, and recover access if needed.

Steps to log in:

Open the app: Tap the BOCHAT icon on your device.

Choose login method: Use the same method you registered with (phone number, email, or social account).

Enter your details:

If using phone number: enter your number and wait for the SMS verification code.

If using email: enter your email and password.

If using social login: tap the appropriate icon (Google/Apple/Facebook) and authorize access.

Verification: Once correct data is entered, you will be redirected to the home screen.

Stay logged in (optional): You can choose "Remember me" to avoid logging in again.

How to recover access:

If you forget your password or lose access:

Tap "Forgot password?" or "Trouble logging in?"

Choose recovery method:

Via phone: Enter your registered number, receive an SMS code, then reset your password.

Via email: Receive a reset link via email.

Verify identity (if needed): You may be asked for additional verification.

Set a new password: Choose a strong password.

Log in again with new credentials.

Important to know:

If you lose both email and phone access, you may need to contact support.

Account recovery does not restore deleted messages.

Keep your contact details updated.

Never share OTP codes or passwords with anyone.

6a03184a723ee85bb71aa3f8.title: Profile Setup in BOCHAT
6a03184a723ee85bb71aa3f8.content:
Your BOCHAT profile represents your identity on the platform and is what others use to recognize you. Setting it up properly helps you present yourself the way you want.

Steps to access profile settings:
Open BOCHAT
Tap the profile icon
Select "Edit Profile" or tap the pencil icon ✏️

Add profile picture:
Tap the image icon
Choose camera or gallery
Edit (crop/rotate) if needed
Save changes

Tip: Use a clear and appropriate image.

Add bio:
Write a short description (up to ~150 characters)
You can add emojis or hashtags
Save
Examples:
📖 Book lover | 💻 Developer
Personal account
My thoughts only

Edit name and username:
Display name: can be changed anytime and does not need to be unique
Username (@username): unique identifier used for search and mentions
Must contain no spaces and can include letters, numbers, and _

Customize account:
Privacy settings: control who sees your profile
Notifications: messages, followers, activity
Theme: dark/light mode (if available)
Social linking (optional)

Important:
Username changes may be limited
Profile changes do not affect old chats
Avoid sharing sensitive personal info in bio
Public accounts are visible to everyone

6a0318d3723ee85bb71aa3fa.title: Following Users
6a0318d3723ee85bb71aa3fa.content:
Following on BOCHAT allows you to see updates and posts from other users without requiring them to follow you back.

How to follow:
Search for a user or @username
Open their profile
Tap Follow
Private accounts may require approval

Unfollow:
Open profile
Tap Follow again
Select Unfollow

No notification is sent when you follow or unfollow someone.

Understanding follow system:
Public accounts: instant follow
Private accounts: require approval
Mutual follow improves messaging experience

Creating your first post:
Tap (+)
Choose content type (text/photo/video)
Add caption or hashtags
Choose privacy (public/followers)
Tap Post

Interactions:
Like, comment, share, save
Posts can be edited or deleted (depending on feature)

Messaging:
Open profile → Message
Mutual followers can chat directly
Others send message requests

Settings basics:
Change language
Privacy controls
Notifications

Mobile usage tips:
iOS vs Android differences
Enable notifications
Use dark mode
Keep app updated

Beginner tips:
Use strong password
Do not share OTP
Enable 2FA if available
Respect others
Avoid spam
No harmful content or impersonation

6a031949723ee85bb71aa43d.title: Smart Two-Factor Authentication (2FA)
6a031949723ee85bb71aa43d.content:
The first and most important step is enabling Two-Factor Authentication (2FA). But BOCHAT goes beyond simply sending a traditional SMS code:

Authentication Apps: You can link your BOCHAT account to apps like Google Authenticator or Microsoft Authenticator. These apps generate a code that changes every 30 seconds, making it nearly impossible for anyone to access your account even if your password is stolen.

"Trusted Device" Feature: After enabling 2FA, you can mark your personal devices (your main phone, tablet, etc.) as trusted devices. You won’t be asked for the authentication code every time you log in from them, saving time without compromising security.

Smart Recovery Options: If you lose your phone, BOCHAT provides one-time backup recovery codes. Be sure to store them in a safe place (not inside the app itself).

6a031968723ee85bb71aa45b.title: AI-Powered Suspicious Activity Detection
6a031968723ee85bb71aa45b.content:
BOCHAT uses an AI-powered system that monitors your usual login patterns. When it detects unusual activity (such as a login attempt from another country in the middle of the night), the system automatically:

Sends an instant security notification to all your trusted devices.

Requests additional verification (such as a security question or an email verification code).

Temporarily blocks the login attempt until you personally approve it.

This feature works like a "digital immune system" that stops attacks before they succeed.

6a03198b723ee85bb71aa45d.title: Remote Active Session Management
6a03198b723ee85bb71aa45d.content:
How many times have you forgotten to log out from your account on a friend’s device or a public computer? In BOCHAT, you can go to Security Settings → Connected Devices to view a list of all currently active sessions (device type, operating system, last activity, and approximate location). From there, you can:

End any device session with a single click.

Change your password instantly and log out from all devices at once.

Rename your devices (such as "Ahmed’s Phone" or "Home Tablet") to easily recognize them.

6a0319a8723ee85bb71aa45f.title: Strong Passwords & Built-in Password Generator
6a0319a8723ee85bb71aa45f.content:
BOCHAT prevents the use of weak passwords such as "123456" or "password". When creating a new account or changing your password, the app provides:

A password strength indicator (Weak, Medium, Strong).

A built-in random password generator (a rare feature in chat applications) that allows you to create a complex 16-character password containing uppercase/lowercase letters, numbers, and symbols directly within the app. BOCHAT then offers the option to save it to your device’s password manager.

6a0319c3723ee85bb71aa461.title: Instant Login Notifications
6a0319c3723ee85bb71aa461.content:
A simple yet highly effective feature: you can enable "Notify me when a new device logs in." You will instantly receive a notification via your registered email and within BOCHAT itself (on any other trusted device), including:

Device type and operating system.

Approximate IP address and location.

Date and time.

If the login was not made by you, you can immediately click "Block this device" directly from the notification without even opening the app.

6a031a38723ee85bb71aa476.title: Steps to Change Chat Backgrounds in BOCHAT
6a031a38723ee85bb71aa476.content:
BOCHAT features a simple and user-friendly interface, allowing you to customize chat backgrounds in two ways:

Method 1: From Inside a Specific Chat
Open the conversation you want to customize (individual or group).

Tap the three-line menu button (☰) in the top-right corner of the screen or tap the contact name.

Choose "Customize Chat" or "Chat Background".

You will see three options:

Default BOCHAT Backgrounds: A collection of ready-made designs (calm colors, landscapes, geometric patterns).

Choose from Gallery: Upload an image from your phone (personal photo, landscape, or any image you prefer).

Solid Color: Choose a plain color and adjust its transparency level.

After making your selection, tap "Apply" — this conversation will now have its own unique background.

Method 2: Set a Global Background for All Chats
Go to Settings ⚙️ from the home screen.

Select "Appearance & Customization" → "Global Chat Background".

Follow the same steps above, but the changes will apply to all chats that do not have an individually customized background.

6a031a5e723ee85bb71aa478.title: Smart Features for Background Customization
6a031a5e723ee85bb71aa478.content:
BOCHAT is not just an ordinary messaging app — it adds smart touches for a better user experience:

1. Adaptive Background
When you choose a personal image with bright colors, the app automatically adjusts the text color and chat bubble colors for maximum readability. For example: if your background is dark, the text becomes white; if it is light, the text becomes black.

2. Blur Effect
You can enable the "Background Blur" feature with a blur intensity between 20%–80% to make text stand out more while keeping the original image as a beautiful blurred background. This feature is especially useful when the image is crowded or visually noisy.

3. Lightweight Live Wallpapers
For users with mid-range to high-performance devices, BOCHAT offers lightweight animated wallpapers (such as calm waves or falling leaves) without draining battery life, since they use animated WebP technology instead of full video backgrounds.

4. Background Sync Across Devices
When you log in from another device (computer or tablet), your customized backgrounds are automatically synced through the cloud — including not only the image itself, but also blur levels and effects.

At BOCHAT, the focus is not only on theoretical knowledge, but also on practical skills that help effectively improve and develop the platform.

The required skills vary depending on the contributor’s role (Frontend / Backend / Mobile / DevOps / UI-UX), but they share a common technical foundation that supports building a strong and scalable system.

Required Technical Skills
1. Frontend Development

Preferred skills include:

React.js (or Next.js)
HTML5 / CSS3
JavaScript / TypeScript
Responsive Design
Working with REST APIs
State Management (such as Redux or Context API)

2. Backend Development

Preferred skills include:

Node.js
Express.js or NestJS
RESTful APIs / WebSockets
Authentication & Authorization (JWT)
Data handling and backend logic

3. Databases

Important knowledge includes:

MongoDB or PostgreSQL
Database design
CRUD operations
Query optimization

4. Mobile Development

Preferred skills include:

React Native or Flutter
Working with APIs
Application state management
Performance optimization across devices

5. UI/UX Design

Required skills include:

Figma or similar design tools
Designing user-friendly interfaces
Understanding user experience (UX)
Turning designs into practical experiences

6. DevOps & Infrastructure

Preferred knowledge includes:

Docker
CI/CD pipelines
Server management
Application deployment
Performance monitoring

Additional Important Skills

Git & GitHub for code management
Basic cybersecurity knowledge
Working with external APIs
Writing clean code
Problem-solving skills

Important Notes

You are not required to master all skills
You can specialize in only one field
Contributions are evaluated based on quality, not quantity
Continuous learning is very important within the team

6a0326cb723ee85bb71aa54f.title: Types of Contributions in BOCHAT Development
6a0326cb723ee85bb71aa54f.content:
At BOCHAT, developers, designers, and tech enthusiasts are welcome to contribute to improving and continuously developing the platform. Contributions can take many forms depending on your skills and interests.

1. Developing New Features

This includes adding new functionalities to the platform such as:

New communication or interaction features
Improvements to chat or notifications
Developing tools for users or ambassadors
Building new pages or systems within the application

2. Bug Fixes

This includes:

Fixing frontend bugs
Resolving backend issues
Handling performance or crash problems
Improving overall system stability

3. Performance Optimization

Focused on:

Speeding up page loading
Improving application responsiveness
Reducing resource consumption
Enhancing API and database efficiency

4. Improving UI/UX

This includes enhancing the user experience by:

Improving interface design and appearance
Making the platform easier and clearer to use
Enhancing navigation within the app
Improving visual and interactive quality

5. Suggesting New Ideas

Contributors can submit:

Ideas for new platform features
Solutions to improve user experience
Suggestions for system or performance improvements
Innovative ideas to support platform growth

6a03270e723ee85bb71aa551.title: How to Work on a Project Inside BOCHAT
6a03270e723ee85bb71aa551.content:
At BOCHAT, projects are managed using a professional workflow based on Git practices to ensure organized code management, proper review of changes, and system stability during development.

1. Git / GitHub (Code Management)

Git and GitHub are used for collaborative project management:

Each developer works on their own branch
Direct edits to the main branch are not allowed
All changes are tracked through version control
Previous versions of the code can be restored when needed

2. Pull Requests (PRs)

After completing a feature or update:

The developer creates a Pull Request (PR)
The changes are clearly described
The PR is linked to the related issue or task (if available)

Goal:
Review changes before merging them into the main project

3. Code Review

After opening the Pull Request:

The development team reviews the code
Code quality and cleanliness are checked
Performance and security are evaluated
Additional modifications or improvements may be requested before approval

Goal:
Ensure code quality and system stability before merging

4. Deployment

After the code is approved:

It is merged into the main or develop branch
The deployment process is started
Updates are pushed to the server or production environment
Features are tested on the live version

Goal:
Deliver updates to users safely without disrupting the service

Complete Workflow

Choose a task or feature
Create a new branch
Develop the feature or fix the issue
Push changes to GitHub
Open a Pull Request
Code Review
Approval and merge
Deployment

Important Notes

No code is merged without review
Every change must be clear and documented
Writing clear commit messages is recommended
Code should be tested before pushing
